top_papers.title: Gradient-Gated DPO: Stabilizing Preference Optimization in Language Models
top_papers.why_trending: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a critical technique for LLM alignment, and this paper addresses the previously unidentified squeezing effect that degrades model diversity—a major practical limitation in production systems.

top_papers.title: SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection
top_papers.why_trending: Speculative decoding is essential infrastructure for efficient LLM inference at scale. This adaptive approach with compression-aware gamma selection addresses a critical practical bottleneck in production deployments.

top_papers.title: Pareto frontier of portfolio investment under volatility uncertainty and short-sale constraints market
top_papers.why_trending: Portfolio optimization under model uncertainty (via sublinear expectation) is gaining prominence as volatility surfaces become less stationary. This work provides a principled theoretical framework combining Pareto analysis with practical short-sale constraints.

topics.name: Language Model Alignment & Preference Learning
topics.summary: Methods for aligning LLMs with human preferences through direct optimization, including preference robustness, output reliability, and diversity-preserving training approaches under binary reward signals.

topics.name: Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback
topics.summary: Training techniques for improving LLM reasoning via verifiable rewards, addressing challenges like diversity collapse, reference sampling strategies, and principled policy optimization.

topics.name: Neural Network Efficiency & Optimization
topics.summary: Techniques for accelerating inference and training, including speculative decoding, layer-wise monitoring, retraction-free manifold methods, sparse attention, and quantization approaches.

topics.name: Large Language Model Inference
topics.summary: Methods for efficient and reliable LLM deployment, covering speculative decoding, attention optimization, quantization, planning workflows, and metacognitive safety under adversarial conditions.

topics.name: Quantitative Finance & Portfolio Theory
topics.summary: Portfolio selection, option pricing, and risk modeling under model uncertainty, including high-frequency data integration, variance reduction in Monte Carlo, and theoretical advances in asset allocation.

topics.name: Uncertainty Quantification in Finance
topics.summary: Handling volatility uncertainty and model risk in financial applications through sublinear expectations, eigenvalue-based approximations, and correlation-aware pricing models.

topics.name: Reinforcement Learning & Control
topics.summary: Application of RL across diverse domains (robotics, satellite networks, CO2 storage, logistics, medical control) with focus on partial observability, multi-objective optimization, and safe constrained exploration.

topics.name: Anomaly Detection & Outlier Discovery
topics.summary: Unsupervised and semi-supervised methods for detecting structural anomalies and out-of-distribution samples, including synthetic anomaly generation, flow-based approaches, and representation-based diagnostics.

topics.name: Time Series & Sequential Modeling
topics.summary: Neural architectures for temporal data including multi-scale MLPs, parallelizable RNNs, horizon-aware training for long-horizon tasks, discrete-time operators, RUL prediction, and online filtering.

topics.name: Prediction Markets & Informed Trading Detection
topics.summary: Detection and characterization of insider trading and informed trading behavior in decentralized markets, with novel methodologies for information leakage scoring and settlement mechanisms for trade credit.

topics.name: Active Learning & Data Acquisition
topics.summary: Strategic label acquisition and sample selection methods including Lipschitz-constrained selective prediction, gradient-based acquisition criteria, multi-task matrix completion, and adaptive human-AI collaboration.

topics.name: Domain-Specific Deep Learning Applications
topics.summary: Applications across chemistry, biology, medical imaging, materials science, and engineering including multi-fidelity surrogates, molecular reasoning, spectral analysis, graph generation, physics-informed learning, and sensor-based recognition.
